const audiences = [
  { title: "Marketers & Growth",      emoji: "📈", desc: "AI for SEO, content, ads, social media and lead generation.", href: "/ai-tools/industry/marketing" },
  { title: "Developers",              emoji: "⚡", desc: "Code assistants, API tools, testing and DevOps automation.", href: "/ai-tools/category/coding-and-dev" },
  { title: "Content Creators",        emoji: "✍️", desc: "Writing, video, images, podcasts and creative workflows.", href: "/ai-tools/category/writing-and-content" },
  { title: "Business & Sales",        emoji: "💼", desc: "CRM, outreach, proposals, contracts and analytics.", href: "/ai-tools/industry/sales" },
  { title: "Designers",               emoji: "🎨", desc: "Image generation, UI design, branding and creative tools.", href: "/ai-tools/category/design-and-ui" },
  { title: "Researchers & Educators", emoji: "🧠", desc: "Research assistants, summarization, learning and tutoring.", href: "/ai-tools/category/research-and-education" },
];
--
